name: Edwards Corner Farmers' Market

Products.value: Fresh, local and organic foods, crafts and other products from more than 30 vendors

Address.value: 57 Edwards Access Rd, Edwards, CO 81632 (Edwards West Plaza)

notes: On-file website http://edwardscornerfarmersmarket.com/ is dead (connection refused). No dedicated market-run website was found; best available official-ish source is the Edwards Metropolitan District page (edwards-colorado.com/farmer-s-market), which explicitly states it is not affiliated with the market but lists current 2026 season hours, dates, location, and direct contact info (phone/email) for market inquiries, plus the market's own Instagram handle. Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/edwardsfarmersmarket/ (title 'Edwards Farmer's Market | Edwards CO') was confirmed via search but its content could not be fetched directly (JS-rendered), so it was not used as a field source. Left official_website empty since no genuinely market-owned site was located. SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, and certified organic status were not clearly stated anywhere found, so omitted. Note the on-file address (56 Edwards Village Blvd.) differs slightly from the address given by this source (57 Edwards Access Rd, Edwards West Plaza) -- both likely refer to the same shopping plaza.
